name: CLX - Sentinel Credential Age Check v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron 06:00 daily. Walks sentinel_credential_inventory, raises a warning when next_rotation_due is within warning_threshold_days, raises critical when past due. Aggregation_key dedups within the month.

parameters.jsCode:
const summary = $('Evaluate').first().json;
return { json: { ok: true, credentials_checked: summary.credentials_checked, alerts_raised: (summary.alerts || []).length } };
